description:
A test execution machine for automating SoapUI and ReadyAPI tests at scale. Run tests in parallel; deploy faster.


- ReadyAPI Compatibility: TestEngine 1.36.0 now fully supports ReadyAPI 4.1.0, ensuring seamless integration with the latest version.
- Library Updates: TestEngine 1.36.0 uses newer versions of several libraries than 1.35.0. If your scripts reference any classes from the libraries updated in TestEngine 1.36.0, review and update them as needed.
